message: Jake
Fabar
Sorry, I’m busy right now. Besides, I have nothing to talk to you about.
The director went back to the film crew. At this rate, he probably won't talk to us today.
Hey,
! How have you been?
Hello, you seem to be in good spirits, director.
Yeah, the shooting is going okay somehow.
Hey
. Things are going smoothly on this end.
Look
Talk
Listen

The dense greens of Central Park are looming right there. It really feels like an urban oasis.
A crowd of onlookers has gathered around the filming site. Even though it's already high noon, they must be a bunch of real time-wasters.
Between scenes, the staff seem busy preparing for the next shoot.
Just talking about rumors regarding Ginny, and suddenly a tense mood has settled in.
It might not just be a rumor that Ginny is being pursued by Tonny and the director.
This is bad.
He seems genuinely angry.
Thanks to the shoot going smoothly, he seems to be in a pretty good mood. Not necessarily a bad thing.
Is it going to end up like this?
I wonder if he's just about to hit middle age. With quite the double chin and a belly, he gives off an air of dignity.
He has a gentle face, but it seems this scandal with the actress isn't his first.
I'm saying I'm uncomfortable, you know?
If you're a detective, then have an eye to discern what the truth is.
You wouldn't have done something terrible, would you?
Me, make a mistake? No way!
I hope that's true. Gabriela isn't the kind of woman who does unreasonable things; there must be a reason behind it.
What’s wrong? You’re looking really down.
No.
Actually, Gabriela just canceled her request today.
Has Ginny been found?
No, not yet.
What on earth happened? Canceling the request before finding Ginny.
He probably means no harm, but Tonny's jokes are terrible!
A joke.
Is the thing about Ginny a joke?
Hey, hey.
Come on, you weren't seriously believing that, were you?
Lately, there have been a lot of unpleasant things, and it's really getting me down. At least I have the comfort of knowing that filming is progressing.
So, what's going on with that request from Gabriela?
Unfortunately...
Ginny hasn't been found yet.
I see.
Still not?.
That's kind of unsettling.
Meryl seems to be doing well lately. She's been working enough to make up for the delays.
That's good to hear.
Must mean that the job I asked you about is going well.
If Meryl keeps it up, filming should go smoothly.
That's enough. You're getting in the way of the shoot!
So, Jennifer isn't here today?
What, are you here for her? By the way, she seemed to be interested in you too.
R-really?
You might have caught her eye.
Jennifer isn't here right now. She should be in the Caribbean or somewhere for a CF shoot. She might be back today.
Is that so?
Yeah. I just wish she'd hurry back and join the shoot.
Are you seriously thinking you could end up with Jennifer? You might want to reconsider.
Huh?
Why's that?
You see, actresses are different from regular people. They live off money and luxury.
Huh.
No offense, but with your income, you could never support her.
Thanks for the advice.
This doesn't really concern you. Just don't go making the cast grumpy like that!
Today I'm shooting the background where Cindy and Guy are supposed to be.
The background they’re supposed to be in, huh?
If it comes to that, we can always just composite it together. It's like insurance for emergencies.
If I don’t catch up, the producer will get grumpy.
I don’t care about Gabriella right now. I just want her to not interfere with the shoot!
I wonder what Gabriella is thinking.
There seem to be various circumstances involved.
I don’t think it’s necessary to tell the director everything.
I can understand that to some extent,
but,
she is a cold woman.
She also seems quite busy; it looks like the stress is getting to her.
Speaking of which, she always has a tired look on her face.
I hope she doesn’t end up getting sick.
Even so, she is a somewhat delicate woman.
Let’s just stop talking about that, alright?
I’m shocked that you think of me that way.
I don't know a girl named Ginny.
So, is Tony lying then?
Which one do you trust more, me or Tony?
Oh, was that wrong?
Of course it is! First of all, I don’t know someone named Ginny.
But you seemed to care about Ginny, didn't you?
W-well, of course I care. She’s a connection through someone I know.
I wanted to ask you something, if that’s okay?
What is it?
I heard from Tony Ford that Ginny, Jennifer, and Meryl are in a heated battle over the director.
Pfft.
Ha ha ha, if that were true, I’d be so happy I'd jump for joy.
He really seems put out. Was the thing with Ginny completely made up?
Thanks to Meryl's serious approach to work, it seems the director is in a good mood too. I hope everything goes smoothly from here.
It seems he's finally relieved that filming has resumed. For the director, a movie is something irreplaceably important.
It seems he’s in good spirits at work knowing that his daughter is alive.
I wonder what will happen between him and the director if Cindy ends up living with Meryl?
I wonder what Meryl intends to do when she meets Cindy. Is she thinking of atoning for her sins all of a sudden?
Jennifer didn't have a shoot today, huh? It's a shame I can't see her.
So, Jennifer isn’t around right now?
Then, that means Eva wasn’t in this town around the time of the murder.
Maybe the director is worried about the request because he’s connected to Gabriela in some way.
Could there be a secret he doesn’t want to uncover?
Is he just uncomfortable with his past being known by Meryl or others?
The chances of Ginny still being alive are quite low. The ending Gabriela hopes for may be hopeless.
It's unfortunate what happened with Ginny, but Gabriela didn't seem too sad about it.
I wonder if she anticipated this outcome, or if she’s just thinking she can easily replace one of the prostitutes.
She probably had information before Eva's case hit the papers. They say 'the way of the snake is the snake,' does she have connections in the police?
The director seems quite concerned about Ginny. I can't believe he could still be hot for her.
I feel like I've caught a glimpse of the hardships of being a prostitute.
Well, what should I do now?
I’ll take my leave now. I’m sorry for intruding.
Come visit again, okay?
Please don't come to bother me anymore.
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
